name: Trafalgar Law (OP05-069) (Manga)
effect_text: [When Attacking] If your opponent has more DON!! cards on their field than you, look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Heart Pirates] type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set without the original textured foil.
